_comment: Measured 2026-07-16. All seven manifest routes are lazy. Initial JS is 159.10 KiB gzip; initial CSS is 36.37 KiB gzip; the largest route graph (overview) is 190.74 KiB gzip. PWA precache is about 1.35 MiB and fonts are runtime-cached (112 assets, about 2.38 MiB total). Caps retain bounded deployment headroom and must not be raised without explaining the regression.
